ddls:
CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "production_name" TEXT /* Name of the production */,
  "first_performed" TEXT /* Date the production was first performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the production */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., play, musical, opera) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the production (e.g., comedy, drama, tragedy) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the production in minutes */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., theater, stadium, arena) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., production company, theater company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_venues" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "performance_count" INTEGER /* Number of performances at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "company_role" TEXT /* Role of the company in the production (e.g., producer, co-producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_and_crew" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person (e.g., actor, director, producer) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_cast_and_crew" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person in the production */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, producer, director) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the production (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the performance was held */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the performance */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the production (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date of the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "box_office_date" TEXT /* Date of the box office entry */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the production on that date */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playwrights" (
  "playwright_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playwright */,
  "playwright_name" TEXT /* Name of the playwright */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the playwright */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playwright_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_playwrights" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "playwright_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playwright */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "playwright_id")
)
